'''Calum Gahan''' (born 23 April 1997) is a [[Scotland national rugby league team|Scotland international]] [[rugby league]] footballer who plays as a {{rlp|hk}} for [[Toulouse Olympique]] in the [[Super League]].

He previously played for the [[London Broncos]] in the [[2022 RFL Championship|Championship]].

==Early life==
Gahan was born in [[Humpty Doo]],<ref>{{cite web|url=https://m.youtube.com/watch?v=ltW4uWXqBDU&pp=ygUVQ2FsdW0gZ2FoYW4gaW5zdGFncmFt|title=𝙻𝚎 𝙲𝚅 𝚍𝚎 𝗖𝗮𝗹𝘂𝗺 𝗚𝗮𝗵𝗮𝗻|website=YouTube|date=19 November 2022|accessdate=3 February 2026}}</ref> Australia, and is of [[Scotland|Scottish]] descent.<ref>[https://www.zerotackle.com/players/calum-gahan/ Zero Tackle profile]</ref><ref>[https://www.theroar.com.au/2022/09/29/scotland-world-cup-predicted-squad-bravehearts-will-need-to-be-brave-and-then-some-to-stand-chance-in-horror-group/ Scotland World Cup squad: Bravehearts need to be brave and then some to stand chance in horror group]</ref> Gahan attended school in [[Queensland]].<ref>[https://www.ntnews.com.au/sport/nrl/high-hopes-for-nt-rugby-teens/news-story/aa20ff5f56bdbb3cce0c388095220a8d High hopes for NT rugby teens]</ref>

Gahan played his junior rugby league for the Litchfield Bears<ref>[https://www.ntnews.com.au/sport/darwin-rugby-league-players-star-for-townsvillebased-high-school-in-prestigious-queensland-schoolboys-competition-grand-final/news-story/b7a9ac1974ee7a7616dd5e4ca5807409 Darwin rugby league players star for Townsville-based high school in prestigious Queensland schoolboys competition grand final]</ref> and represented the [[Rugby league in the Northern Territory|Northern Territories]] at youth level.<ref>[https://territorystories.nt.gov.au/10070/618872/0/53 NT takes national title]</ref>

==Playing career==
===Club career===
Gahan came through the youth system at the [[North Queensland Cowboys]].<ref>[https://www.cowboys.com.au/news/2017/03/10/nyc-calling-on-experience-to-step-up-/ NYC calling on experience to step up]</ref> Between 2018 and 2021, he played for the [[Norths Devils]] in the [[Queensland Cup]].<ref>[https://nothingbutleague.com/player/calum-gahan/ Nothing But League profile]</ref>

====London Broncos====
Gahan joined [[London Broncos|London]] at the start of the [[2022 RFL Championship|2022 season]].<ref>[https://www.loverugbyleague.com/post/london-broncos-add-australian-hooker-to-their-ranks/ London Broncos add Australian hooker to their ranks]</ref>

====Toulouse Olympique====
On 3  November 2022, it was announced that Gahan had joined [[Toulouse Olympique]] for the start of the [[2023 RFL Championship|2023 season]].<ref>{{cite web|url=https://www.loverugbyleague.com/post/toulouse-olympique-announce-first-signing-for-2023-championship-season/|title=Toulouse Olympique announce first signing for 2023 Championship season|website=Love Rugby League|date=3 Nov 2022|accessdate=4 Nov 2022}}</ref>

In March 2025 Gahan suffered an injury to his Achilles tendon. He aigned a new contract with the club in October 2025. Coach [[Sylvain Houles]] stated, "Calum is a very good player, a great professional and a wonderful person. After his injury, it was important for us to keep him, especially after everything he has done for the club, on and off the pitch."<ref>{{cite web|url=https://www.totalrl.com/calum-gahan-signs-new-toulouse-olympique-contract/|title=Calum Gahan signs new Toulouse Olympique contract|website=Total Rugby League|last=Ibbetsen|first=Stephen|date=21 October 2025|accessdate=17 January 2026}}</ref> Gahan then injured his foot, announcing the injury whilst in his fifth week of rehabilitation.<ref>{{cite web|url=https://www.loverugbyleague.com/post/calum-gahan-surgery-on-foot-ahead-of-2026|title=Super League newcomers suffer injury blow ahead of 2026 as overseas star sidelined|website=Love Rugby League|last=Olawumi|first=Ben|date=10 December 2025|accessdate=17 January 2026}}</ref>

===International career===
In 2022 Gahan was named in the [[2021 Men's Rugby League World Cup squads#Scotland|Scotland squad]] for the [[2021 Rugby League World Cup]].<ref>[https://www.loverugbyleague.com/post/rugby-league-world-cup-2021-squad-lists/ Full list of every squad at the Rugby League World Cup 2021]</ref>

In 2022 Gahan made his international debut for [[Scotland national rugby league team|Scotland]] against the [[England Knights national rugby league team|England Knights]].<ref>[https://europeanrugbyleague.com/fixtures/1147 Scotland 4-28 England Knights]</ref>
